---
title: "Homework 3"
author: "Michael Weigand"
format: html
editor: visual
[Link to my GitHub Repository](https://github.com/michiwei2002-bit/ENVS-193DS_homework-03.git)
---



```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)

# Read in the soil salinity data
salinity <- read_csv(here("Data", "salinity-pickleweed.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()
```


```{r}
# Read in your personal data from your local 'Data' folder
personal_data <- read_csv(here("Data", "personal_pushup_data.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()
```
